target.title: test(param-key): add unit tests for parameter key normalization
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The `param-key.ts` module provides parameter key normalization utilities that convert camelCase keys to snake_case. Without tests, the normalization logic could silently regress.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add unit tests for `resolveSnakeCaseParamKey` and `readSnakeCaseParamRaw` covering exact key matching, snake_case fallback, multiple uppercase letters, numbers, whitespace, and null/undefined/object values.

## User Impact

Parameter key normalization now has comprehensive test coverage, reducing regression risk.

## Evidence

Direct behavior probe:

```text
$ node --import tsx -e "import('./src/param-key.js').then(({resolveSnakeCaseParamKey})=>console.log(JSON.stringify([{k:'myKey',p:{myKey:'value'},r:resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({myKey:'value'},'myKey'),e:'myKey'},{k:'myKey',p:{my_key:'value'},r:resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({my_key:'value'},'myKey'),e:'my_key'},{k:'myXMLParser',p:{my_xml_parser:'value'},r:resolveSnakeCaseParamKey({my_xml_parser:'value'},'myXMLParser'),e:'my_xml_parser'}])))"
[{"k":"myKey","p":{"myKey":"value"},"r":"myKey","e":"myKey"},{"k":"myKey","p":{"my_key":"value"},"r":"my_key","e":"my_key"},{"k":"myXMLParser","p":{"my_xml_parser":"value"},"r":"my_xml_parser","e":"my_xml_parser"}]
```

Targeted test:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/param-key.test.ts

Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  15 passed (15)
  Duration  763ms
```

Formatting:

```text
$ npx oxfmt --check src/param-key.ts src/param-key.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.
```

Whitespace:

```text
$ git diff --check
```
